---
title: "About Me"
---

## Who I Am

I am a **3rd-year Data Science and Society student** at Central European University, specializing in translating data into actionable insights using both quantitative analysis and object-oriented software engineering.

---

### Education
- **BSc in Data Science and Society** | Central European University (2023 - Present)
- **Previous Degree/Certification** | [Institution Name] (Year)

### Technical Skills
- **Programming**: Python (Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, Shiny), R, SQL
- **Software Engineering**: Object-Oriented Programming (OOP), Git/GitHub
- **Visualization**: Quarto, Tableau, Plotly
- **Data Science**: Machine Learning, Statistical Modeling, Data Pre-processing

### Interests
- **Interactive Visualization**: Designing dashboards that make complex data accessible.
- **Sustainable Data**: Exploring environmental datasets through a data-driven lens.
- **AI Ethics**: Understanding the societal impact of algorithmic decision-making.

---

When I'm not coding, you can find me exploring [Interest 1], reading [Book/Topic], or [Activity].
